locations.name: Kapaleeshwarar Temple
locations.description: A 7th-century Dravidian temple with a stunning gopuram tower — 40m of carved mythology in vivid color. The geometric patterns are endlessly photogenic.
locations.heroShot: Frame the gopuram through the pillared corridor at dawn, using the columns as leading lines toward the painted tower.

locations.name: Marina Beach Promenade
locations.description: The second-longest urban beach in the world. At sunrise, the Bay of Bengal paints the sky in gradients that no filter can replicate.
locations.heroShot: Shoot the fishermen's silhouettes against the orange sunrise, with the wet sand reflecting the sky like a mirror.

locations.name: Mylapore Heritage Streets
locations.description: A labyrinth of narrow lanes where kolam patterns, temple walls, and flower vendors create a sensory overload of texture and color.
locations.heroShot: Capture the morning kolam artist from above, the white rice flour patterns contrasting against the dark wet street.

locations.name: Anna Nagar Tower Park
locations.description: A brutalist concrete tower rising from a manicured park. The raw geometric form creates stark, modernist compositions against the sky.
locations.heroShot: Shoot straight up through the tower's internal spiral for a dizzying geometric abstraction in concrete and sky.

locations.name: T. Nagar Bazaar District
locations.description: South India's busiest shopping district transforms at night into a cyberpunk maze of neon signs, silk shops, and chaotic energy.
locations.heroShot: From the footbridge, capture the river of traffic and neon signs in long exposure — the chaos distilled into streaks of light.

locations.name: San Thome Basilica
locations.description: A Neo-Gothic white basilica built over the tomb of St. Thomas the Apostle. The stark white against blue sky is pure minimalism.
locations.heroShot: Use the symmetrical nave as a vanishing point, with the stained glass windows creating color accents in the white space.

locations.name: Urban Green Space
locations.description: Every city hides pockets of green. The interplay of natural and urban elements creates unique compositional opportunities.
locations.heroShot: Find where the tree canopy creates a natural frame for the skyline beyond — nature framing civilization.

locations.name: Texture-Rich Alleyway
locations.description: The hidden arteries of urban life. Peeling paint, graffiti, and fire escapes create compositions that galleries would envy.
locations.heroShot: Wait for a single figure to walk through the shaft of light between buildings — the urban spotlight moment.

locations.name: Elevated Vantage Point
locations.description: Height transforms chaos into pattern. From above, the city reveals its true geometry — the organic grid of human settlement.
locations.heroShot: Shoot the transition from day to night as streetlights flicker on, creating a grid of warm points against the blue dusk.
